title: Gridshare Telemetry
description: Time-bucketed telemetry for a Gridshare device or sensor. energy_Wh_increment / energy_Wh_decrement are lifetime cumulative values populated only when include=energy is requested.

stateOfCharge_pct.description: Battery state of charge percent (battery_pack devices only).

energy_Wh_increment.description: Lifetime cumulative energy flowing INTO the device (positive). Populated when include=energy.

energy_Wh_decrement.description: Lifetime cumulative energy flowing OUT of the device (negative). Populated when include=energy.
